events.rule.tag.CfnAbout:
A key-value pair associated with an ECS Target of an EventBridge rule. The tag will be propagated to ECS by EventBridge when starting an ECS task based on a matched event. 

**Important**  
Currently, tags are only available when using ECS with EventBridge.

events.rule.tag.Key.Description: A string you can use to assign a value. The combination of tag keys and values can help you organize and categorize your resources.

events.rule.tag.Value.Description: The value for the specified tag key.
